title: Sample: designing a globally distributed data service
author: Google Cloud
summary: A sample offline item showing how architecture, consistency, and database tags appear before the first live feed refresh.
content: Distributed databases must explain consistency, replication, failure handling, and operational tradeoffs.

title: Sample: operating observable edge services
author: Sample data
summary: A sample item for testing multi-word search, source filters, and observability tags without network access.
content: Metrics, traces, logs, error budgets, and graceful degradation help teams operate distributed edge systems.
